title: Norway's Constitution Celebration Day
story: Every May 17, Norway throws the world's most colorful birthday party for their constitution! Kids dress in traditional folk costumes called bunads and march through streets waving tiny Norwegian flags. Families eat ice cream, hot dogs, and layer cake while brass bands play cheerful music throughout the day.
activity_question: What do Norwegian children wear during Constitution Day celebrations?
bonus_fact: Norwegian children get to eat ice cream for breakfast on Constitution Day!

title: Connecting the World on May 17
story: Every May 17, people around the globe celebrate World Telecommunication and Information Society Day! This special day honors all the amazing ways we connect with each other - from phones and computers to the internet and satellites. Schools, tech companies, and communities host events to show how technology brings people together across continents. It's a perfect time to appreciate how a simple text or video call can reach someone thousands of miles away in seconds!
activity_question: What does World Telecommunication and Information Society Day celebrate?
activity_choices: Ways technology connects people around the world
The invention of the first telephone only
activity_answer: Ways technology connects people around the world
follow_up_question: What's the most amazing way technology has helped you connect with someone far away?
